plan_under_test: Foreign mark-scheme text labels have deterministic summaries and ranked review candidates.
tests_added_or_changed: Extend the foreign-label audit test to assert mark_scheme_text_foreign_label_summary and mark_scheme_text_foreign_label_review_candidates.
expected_initial_failure: Before implementation, the summary and review-candidate fields are absent.
what_passing_proves: The report exposes prioritized foreign-label evidence for review.
The summary is derived from failure records without changing failure semantics.
what_passing_does_not_prove: It does not repair stale mark-scheme text.
It does not visually inspect images.
risk_of_bad_tests: Low. The fixture has a single contaminated record with two known foreign labels.
